zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Calston於1361年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾爾頓 曼諾時，他的父親Lawrence de Calston31歲，母親Felicity Combe27歲。他於1391年與Joan Childrey在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利霍利 克羅斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Calston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Ralston (Renfrewshire), composed of the personal name Raoul, a vernacular form of Ralph , + Scots toun ‘farm, village’.

variants.name: Ralph
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman and Middle English Raulf, Ralf, an Old French form of ancient Germanic Radulf (from rād ‘counsel, advice’ + wulf ‘wolf’), hence the usual latinization of the name as Radulfus. Ralph was a common personal name among the Normans and from the mid 13th century among the native English. Almost 7% of men in the late 14th century were named Ralph. It was pronounced in a variety of ways, giving rise to a large number of different surnames. Ralf could be shortened to Raff, hence the surname Raff and possibly Raffel . Raulf was sometimes shortened to Raul, giving us Rall and Rawlin (see Rawling ). It also appears as Rauf, which was often shortened to Rau, hence the surnames Rawe and Rawkin (‘young Ralph’), as well as Haw , Hawkins , Daw and Dawkins , derived from rhyming pet forms. In late Middle English the diphthong -au- was sometimes simplified to long -a-, later pronounced ‘ay’ as in modern English day, which accounts for Rafe. This pronunciation of the personal name Ralph is still occasionally found in modern times. Ralph is a learned spelling of Ralf that became common in the 16th century. In Anglo-Norman and Middle English usage, the rarer personal name Rolf was sometimes confused with Ralf, which explains why Ralf is an alternative source for Rolf , Rowe , Dow , and their derivatives.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Calston was born in 1361, in Chilton Manor, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lawrence de Calston, was 31 and his mother, Felicity Combe, was 27. He married Joan Childrey in 1391, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1418, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Holy Cross Church, Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Holy Cross Church, Ramsbury, Wiltshire,: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이 홀이 크로스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Calston(이)가 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 치턴 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence de Calston(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Felicity Combe(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Joan Childrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이 홀이 크로스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Holy Cross Church, Ramsbury, Wiltshire,: холи кросс чурч, рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Calston родился в 1361 г. в местности чилтон манор, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lawrence de Calston было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Felicity Combe, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Childrey в 1391 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1418 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности холи кросс чурч, рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Calston nació en 1361, en Chilton Manor, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lawrence de Calston, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Felicity Combe, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan Childrey en 1391, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1418, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Holy Cross Church, Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
